race.description: Hughendan Jockey Club July 18 C,G & E Hcp (C2)
race.comment: ZOUSLAYER (8) backs up six days after working home well without threatening in a Class 3 over 1400m at Eagle Farm. Better placed back to 1200m and this race is much easier. Great chance to return to the winner's circle. STATEMENT OF TRUTH (3) went to the front last time out over this distance at Doomben and refused to lie down but found one better close to home. Hits the top three at 75% of runs over 1200m. Sure to be right there at the business end. STANDLEE (10) wasn't the best away but found the line with purpose to grab second when resuming over 1000m at Dalby last start. Drops 5 kg today and is sure to play a key role again. MOFEED (4) was in touch on the corner then worked home fairly over 1000m at Dalby recently. Draws a nice gate and is better placed out to this distance.  Big gap to the next best SMART 'N' STYLISH (6) who could improve with blinkers going on for the first time.
